title: micropholis rufa
intro: Micropholis rufa, also known as the Red-barked Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Micropholis rufa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Micropholis rufa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
